title: saxifraga exarata subsp. fastigiata
intro: Saxifraga exarata subsp. fastigiata is a flowering plant species, also known as the upright saxifrage, which belongs to the saxifrage family (Saxifragaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Saxifraga exarata subsp. fastigiata has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, can be made from the plant's roots and leaves, which are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids that contribute to its medicinal and health benefits.
